title: Pow, Rebecca - Parliamentary Under Secretary of State, Department for Environment, Food and Rural Affairs - advice under the Business Appointment Rules
body: "Director of the Shows Board, Royal Bath and West of England Society  Ms Pow received advice from the Independent Adviser on Ministerial Standards on an unpaid appointment with the Royal Bath and West of England Society. The advice was provided in November 2025 and the appointment was taken up in December 2025.  Board member, Somerset Cricket Foundation  Ms Pow received advice from the Independent Adviser on Ministerial Standards on an unpaid appointment with the Somerset Cricket Foundation. The advice was provided in November 2025 and the appointment was taken up later that month.  ACOBA published on its website advice provided to Ms Pow before its closure. "
